channel.title: About on Orim Dominic
channel.description: Recent content in About on Orim Dominic

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! I’m Orim Dominic, software engineer and a technical writer and here’s my resume. A Slack conversation with a colleague appreciating my work Career My career in professional web development started in 2021 as a backend developer and I have grown over the years to become a full-stack developer with JavaScript and Golang. Aside from what I do at work, I mentor (on Exercism) contribute to open source write technical articles (view my writing portfolio) Another conversation with a colleague on Slack appreciating my work
